parameters.query: SELECT id, judul, konten, kategori, tanggal, emoji, gambar_data AS gambar_url, is_featured, priority, layout_size, col_span, row_span FROM public.bapperida_berita ORDER BY priority ASC, id DESC;

INSERT INTO public.bapperida_berita (judul, konten, kategori, tanggal, gambar_data, emoji, priority, layout_size, col_span, row_span, is_featured) VALUES ('{{$json.body.judul ? $json.body.judul.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', '{{$json.body.konten ? $json.body.konten.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', '{{$json.body.kategori || ""}}', '{{$json.body.tanggal || ""}}', '{{$json.body.gambar_url || ""}}', '{{$json.body.emoji || ""}}', {{$json.body.priority || 0}}, '{{$json.body.layout_size || "normal"}}', {{$json.body.col_span || 1}}, {{$json.body.row_span || 1}}, {{$json.body.is_featured ? true : false}}) RETURNING *;

UPDATE public.bapperida_berita SET judul = '{{$json.body.judul ? $json.body.judul.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', konten = '{{$json.body.konten ? $json.body.konten.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', kategori = '{{$json.body.kategori || ""}}', tanggal = '{{$json.body.tanggal || ""}}', gambar_data = '{{$json.body.gambar_url || ""}}', emoji = '{{$json.body.emoji || ""}}', priority = {{$json.body.priority || 0}}, layout_size = '{{$json.body.layout_size || "normal"}}', col_span = {{$json.body.col_span || 1}}, row_span = {{$json.body.row_span || 1}}, is_featured = {{$json.body.is_featured ? true : false}} WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}} RETURNING *;
DELETE FROM public.bapperida_berita WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}};
SELECT id, judul, kategori, tipe, ukuran, tanggal, icon_data AS icon, url FROM public.bapperida_dokumen ORDER BY id DESC;

INSERT INTO public.bapperida_dokumen (judul, kategori, tipe, ukuran, tanggal, icon_data, url) VALUES ('{{$json.body.judul.replace(/'/g, "''")}}', '{{$json.body.kategori}}', '{{$json.body.tipe}}', '{{$json.body.ukuran}}', '{{$json.body.tanggal}}', '{{$json.body.icon}}', '{{$json.body.url}}') RETURNING *;

UPDATE public.bapperida_dokumen SET judul = '{{$json.body.judul ? $json.body.judul.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', kategori = '{{$json.body.kategori || ""}}', tipe = '{{$json.body.tipe || ""}}', ukuran = '{{$json.body.ukuran || ""}}', tanggal = '{{$json.body.tanggal || ""}}', icon_data = '{{$json.body.icon || ""}}', url = '{{$json.body.url || ""}}' WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}} RETURNING *;
DELETE FROM public.bapperida_dokumen WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}};
SELECT id, gambar_data AS gambar_url, judul, subjudul FROM public.bapperida_slider ORDER BY id ASC;

INSERT INTO public.bapperida_slider (judul, subjudul, gambar_data) VALUES ('{{$json.body.judul ? $json.body.judul.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', '{{$json.body.subjudul ? $json.body.subjudul.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', '{{$json.body.gambar_url || ""}}') RETURNING *;

UPDATE public.bapperida_slider SET judul = '{{$json.body.judul ? $json.body.judul.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', subjudul = '{{$json.body.subjudul ? $json.body.subjudul.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', gambar_data = '{{$json.body.gambar_url || ""}}' WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}} RETURNING *;
DELETE FROM public.bapperida_slider WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}};
SELECT id, icon_data AS icon, title, cat, "desc", status, sc, priority FROM public.bapperida_program ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC;

INSERT INTO public.bapperida_program (icon_data, title, cat, "desc", status, sc, priority) VALUES ('{{$json.body.icon || ""}}', '{{$json.body.title ? $json.body.title.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', '{{$json.body.cat || ""}}', '{{$json.body.desc ? $json.body.desc.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', '{{$json.body.status || ""}}', '{{$json.body.sc || ""}}', {{$json.body.priority || 0}}) RETURNING *;

UPDATE public.bapperida_program SET icon_data = '{{$json.body.icon || ""}}', title = '{{$json.body.title ? $json.body.title.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', cat = '{{$json.body.cat || ""}}', "desc" = '{{$json.body.desc ? $json.body.desc.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', status = '{{$json.body.status || ""}}', sc = '{{$json.body.sc || ""}}', priority = {{$json.body.priority || 0}} WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}} RETURNING *;
DELETE FROM public.bapperida_program WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}};

parameters.query: UPDATE public.bapperida_metrics SET value = '{{$json.body.value ? $json.body.value.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}' WHERE id = '{{$json.body.id}}' RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO public.bapperida_inovasi (opd_nama, judul_inovasi, jenis_inovasi, tahapan_inovasi, rancang_bangun, link_video, dokumen_dukung, skor_iga, kategori_skor) VALUES ('{{$json.body.opd_nama ? $json.body.opd_nama.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', '{{$json.body.judul_inovasi ? $json.body.judul_inovasi.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', '{{$json.body.jenis_inovasi || ""}}', '{{$json.body.tahapan_inovasi || ""}}', '{{$json.body.rancang_bangun ? $json.body.rancang_bangun.replace(/'/g, "''") : ""}}', '{{$json.body.link_video || ""}}', '{{$json.body.dokumen_dukung ? JSON.stringify($json.body.dokumen_dukung) : "[]"}}'::jsonb, {{$json.body.skor_iga || 0}}, '{{$json.body.kategori_skor || "Kurang"}}') RETURNING *;
UPDATE public.bapperida_inovasi SET status_approval = 'Approved' WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}} RETURNING *;
DELETE FROM public.bapperida_inovasi WHERE id = {{$json.body.id}} RETURNING *;
